title: lastrea filix-mas var. parallelogrammum
intro: Lastrea filix-mas var. parallelogrammum, also known as the parallel-grammum fern, is a variety of the male fern plant, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the rhizome of the Lastrea filix-mas var. parallelogrammum has been used in herbal medicine for its vermifuge properties, which help to expel parasites and worms from the body. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms associated with parasitic infections, such as abdominal pain and nausea. In terms of herbal preparations, a tea made from the rhizome of the Lastrea filix-mas var. parallelogrammum is often used to treat parasitic infections, and it can also be consumed as a powder or capsule.
